candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; matches total revenue and is the most standard operating sales line.
Explicit total revenue line; same values as Sales and useful as fallback if label changes by year.
This is a cost line, not revenue.
Operating cost component, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Explicit COGS label and best semantic match for direct production/service costs.
Could be a COGS component, but less direct than the explicit COGS label.
Inventory adjustment component, not standalone COGS.
Balancing row should be avoided when a proper operating cost label exists.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS row rather than components or balancing rows.

candidates.why: Core overhead component and strong SG&A match.
Share-based compensation is commonly part of SG&A overhead.
Broad overhead bucket and appropriate SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Supplemental/alternate label and less preferable than the main reported share-based remuneration row.
Not an expense row and not from the income statement.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present, so selected the best overhead component rows and excluded D&A, impairments, interest, taxes, and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Clearly the reported R&D expense line despite misspelling; populated and directly matches the concept.
Alternate label candidate, but appears unpopulated in preview; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Using R&D labels as a priority list; first row is the primary reported R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if no specific interest expense is available.

Too broad and less directly interest-related.
Generic interest expense label, but preview shows no values.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense from borrowings measured at amortised cost

variables.notes: Priority list ordered from the most specific interest expense line to broader finance-cost fallback; later code should use the first non-missing value.

Asset/income-related concept, not shareholders' equity.
Not a balance-sheet equity total.
Only one equity component, not total owner equity.
Reserve component, not total equity.
Reserve component, not total equity.

Income statement attribution line, not balance-sheet minority equity.
